    const prevTrims=[3,2,1].filter(t=>t<getLastTrim()&&state.trims[t]);
    if (prevTrims.length) {
      const prev=state.trims[prevTrims[0]].students.find(p=>p.name===s.name);
      if (prev) { const pa=getStudentAvg(prev); if (pa!==null&&s.avg!==null){ const d=s.avg-pa;
        trend = d>0.3?`<span class="trend-up">↑ +${d.toFixed(1)}</span>`:d<-0.3?`<span class="trend-down">↓ ${d.toFixed(1)}</span>`:'<span class="trend-flat">→ estable</span>'; } }
    }
    const hasNote = state.config.notes[s.name];
    return `<div class="subject-card" style="cursor:pointer; border-top-color:${ac}" onclick="openStudentModal('${escAttr(s.name)}')">
      <div style="display:flex;align-items:flex-start;justify-content:space-between;margin-bottom:10px">
        <div><div style="font-weight:700;font-size:14px">${escHtml(s.name)} ${hasNote?'<span title="Tiene comentario">📝</span>':''}${getAgreements(s.name).length?'<span title="Tiene acuerdos">✅</span>':''}</div><div style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text-muted);margin-top:2px">${trend}</div></div>
        <div class="avg-badge" style="border-color:${ac};color:${ac}">${avgDisp}</div>
      </div>
      ${s.fails>0?`<div style="margin-bottom:8px">${failSubs.slice(0,3).map(sub=>`<span style="font-size:10px;background:rgba(248,113,113,0.1);color:var(--red);border-radius:4px;padding:2px 6px;margin:2px;display:inline-block">✗ ${sub}</span>`).join('')}${failSubs.length>3?`<span style="font-size:10px;color:var(--text-muted)">+${failSubs.length-3}</span>`:''}</div>`:'<div style="margin-bottom:8px"><span style="font-size:11px;color:var(--green)">✓ Sin suspensos</span></div>'}
      <div class="sparkline">${td.subjects.slice(0,14).map(sub=>{const g=s.grades[sub];if(!g||g.type!=='grade')return '<div class="spark-bar" style="height:2px;background:var(--border)"></div>';return `<div class="spark-bar" style="height:${Math.max(2,(g.value/10)*32)}px;background:${isPass(g.value)?'var(--green)':'var(--red)'}" title="${sub}: ${g.value}"></div>`;}).join('')}</div>
    </div>`;
  }).join('');
}

// ============================================================
//  PROGRESSION + GROUP EVOLUTION
// ============================================================
function renderProgression() {
  const search = document.getElementById('filter-prog-search').value.toLowerCase();
  const loaded = getLoadedTrims();

  // Group evolution line (mini)
  const gEl = document.getElementById('group-evolution-wrap');
  if (loaded.length>=2) {
    const gAvgs = loaded.map(t=>{ const a=state.trims[t].students.map(getStudentAvg).filter(v=>v!==null); return a.length?a.reduce((x,y)=>x+y,0)/a.length:null; });
    const max=Math.max(...gAvgs.filter(v=>v!==null),10), min=Math.min(...gAvgs.filter(v=>v!==null),0);
    gEl.innerHTML = `<div class="section-title" style="font-size:1.1rem">Evolución de la media del grupo</div>
      <div class="subject-card" style="border-top-color:var(--cyan); display:flex; align-items:flex-end; gap:24px; padding:24px">
      ${loaded.map((t,i)=>{const a=gAvgs[i];const h=a!==null?((a-min)/(max-min||1))*100+20:2;
        return `<div style="flex:1;text-align:center"><div style="font-size:1.6rem;font-weight:800;color:${avgColor(a)}">${a!==null?a.toFixed(2):'—'}</div><div style="height:${h}px;background:linear-gradient(180deg,var(--cyan),transparent);border-radius:6px 6px 0 0;margin:8px 0"></div><span class="trimestre-badge t${t}">${trimLabel(t)}</span></div>`;}).join('')}
      </div>`;
  } else gEl.innerHTML='';

  const wrap = document.getElementById('progression-wrap');
  if (loaded.length===1) { wrap.innerHTML=`<div class="empty-state"><div class="icon">📊</div><p>Carga al menos dos registros para comparar la progresión individual.</p></div>`; return; }

  const ref = state.trims[loaded[0]];
  let students = ref.students.filter(s=>!search||s.name.toLowerCase().includes(search));
  let html = `<div class="section-title" style="margin-top:24px">Evolución por alumno <span style="font-size:13px;font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;font-weight:400;color:var(--text-muted)">${students.length} alumnos</span></div>`;

  students.forEach(rs => {
    const name = rs.name;
    const tAvgs = loaded.map(t=>{const s=state.trims[t].students.find(x=>x.name===name);return s?getStudentAvg(s):null;});
    const trend = getTrend(tAvgs);
    // recoveries / new fails
    let recovered=0,newFails=0;
    if (loaded.length>=2) {
      const first=state.trims[loaded[0]].students.find(x=>x.name===name);
      const last=state.trims[loaded[loaded.length-1]].students.find(x=>x.name===name);
      if (first&&last) state.subjects.forEach(sub=>{
        const a=first.grades[sub],b=last.grades[sub];
        if (a&&b&&a.type==='grade'&&b.type==='grade'){ if(isFail(a.value)&&isPass(b.value))recovered++; if(isPass(a.value)&&isFail(b.value))newFails++; }
      });
    }
    html += `<div style="background:var(--surface);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:12px;padding:18px;margin-bottom:14px;cursor:pointer" onclick="openStudentModal('${escAttr(name)}')">
      <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;margin-bottom:14px;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:10px">
        <div style="font-weight:700;font-size:15px">${escHtml(name)}</div>
        <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;flex-wrap:wrap">
          ${loaded.map((t,i)=>`<span class="trimestre-badge t${t}">${trimLabelShort(t)}: <strong>${tAvgs[i]!==null?tAvgs[i].toFixed(1):'—'}</strong></span>`).join('')}
          ${recovered?`<span class="alert-chip alert-recover">▲ ${recovered} recup.</span>`:''}
          ${newFails?`<span class="alert-chip alert-drop">▼ ${newFails} nuevo susp.</span>`:''}
          <span style="font-size:13px;font-weight:700" class="${trend.class}">${trend.icon} ${trend.label}</span>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div style="display:flex;gap:10px;flex-wrap:wrap">
        ${state.subjects.slice(0,14).map(sub=>{
          const subTrims=loaded.map(t=>{const s=state.trims[t].students.find(x=>x.name===name);return s?(s.grades[sub]||null):null;});
          const color=getSubjectColor(subjectColorIdx(sub));
          return `<div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:4px;background:var(--surface2);border-radius:6px;padding:4px 8px">
            <span style="font-size:10px;color:${color};font-weight:700">${sub}</span>
            ${subTrims.map((g,i)=>g?`<span class="trimestre-badge t${loaded[i]}" style="font-size:10px;padding:1px 5px">${gradeShort(g)}</span>`:'').filter(Boolean).join('<span style="color:var(--border)">→</span>')}
          </div>`;
        }).join('')}
      </div>
    </div>`;
  });
  wrap.innerHTML = html;
}

// ============================================================
//  ALERTS (risk detection)
// ============================================================
function computeAlerts() {
  const loaded = getLoadedTrims();
  const last = state.trims[getLastTrim()];
  const alerts = { risk:[], drop:[], manyFails:[], belowGroup:[] };
  const groupAvg = (() => { const a=last.students.map(getStudentAvg).filter(v=>v!==null); return a.length?a.reduce((x,y)=>x+y,0)/a.length:0; })();

  last.students.forEach(s => {
    const fails = getStudentFails(s);
    const avg = getStudentAvg(s);
    if (fails>=3) alerts.manyFails.push({name:s.name, fails, avg});
    if (avg!==null && avg < groupAvg-1.5) alerts.belowGroup.push({name:s.name, avg, diff:(avg-groupAvg)});
    // drop between trims
    if (loaded.length>=2) {
      const tAvgs = loaded.map(t=>{const x=state.trims[t].students.find(y=>y.name===s.name);return x?getStudentAvg(x):null;}).filter(v=>v!==null);
      if (tAvgs.length>=2) { const d = tAvgs[tAvgs.length-1]-tAvgs[tAvgs.length-2];
        if (d<=-1.5) alerts.drop.push({name:s.name, drop:d, avg}); }
    }
    if (fails>=3 && avg!==null && isFail(avg)) alerts.risk.push({name:s.name, fails, avg});
  });
  return { alerts, groupAvg };
}
// Renderiza los chips de acuerdos para un alumno (clicables, sin propagar al card)
function agreementChips(name) {
  const active = getAgreements(name);
  return `<div style="display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:4px;margin-top:8px" onclick="event.stopPropagation()">
    ${AGREEMENTS.map(a=>{const on=active.includes(a.id);
      return `<button onclick="toggleAgreement('${escAttr(name)}','${a.id}');renderAlerts();" title="${a.label}"
        style="font-size:10px;border-radius:14px;padding:3px 8px;cursor:pointer;border:1px solid ${on?a.color:'var(--border)'};
        background:${on?a.color:'transparent'};color:${on?'#0f1117':'var(--text-muted)'};font-weight:600;transition:all 0.15s">
        ${a.icon} ${a.label}</button>`;}).join('')}
  </div>`;
}

// Variante para el modal del alumno: actualiza solo su bloque
function agreementChipsModal(name) {
  const active = getAgreements(name);
  return `<div style="display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:5px">
    ${AGREEMENTS.map(a=>{const on=active.includes(a.id);
      return `<button onclick="toggleAgreement('${escAttr(name)}','${a.id}');document.getElementById('modal-agreements').innerHTML=agreementChipsModal('${escAttr(name)}');" title="${a.label}"
        style="font-size:11px;border-radius:14px;padding:4px 10px;cursor:pointer;border:1px solid ${on?a.color:'var(--border)'};
        background:${on?a.color:'transparent'};color:${on?'#0f1117':'var(--text-muted)'};font-weight:600;transition:all 0.15s">
        ${a.icon} ${a.label}</button>`;}).join('')}
  </div>`;
}

function renderAlerts() {
  const { alerts, groupAvg } = computeAlerts();
  const block = (title, icon, color, items, render) => {
    if (!items.length) return '';
    return `<div class="section-title" style="font-size:1.1rem; color:${color}">${icon} ${title} <span style="font-size:13px;font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;font-weight:400;color:var(--text-muted)">${items.length}</span></div>
      <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill,minmax(280px,1fr));gap:12px;margin-bottom:24px">
      ${items.map(render).join('')}</div>`;
  };
  const card = (name, body, accent) => `<div class="subject-card" style="cursor:pointer;border-top-color:${accent}" onclick="openStudentModal('${escAttr(name)}')"><div style="font-weight:700;margin-bottom:6px">${escHtml(name)}</div>${body}${agreementChips(name)}</div>`;

  let html = '';

  // Resumen de acuerdos tomados
  const withAgreements = Object.keys(state.config.agreements||{}).filter(n=>getAgreements(n).length);
  if (withAgreements.length) {
    html += `<div class="section-title" style="font-size:1.1rem;color:var(--green)">✅ Acuerdos registrados <span style="font-size:13px;font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;font-weight:400;color:var(--text-muted)">${withAgreements.length} alumnos</span></div>
      <div style="background:var(--surface);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:12px;padding:16px;margin-bottom:24px">
      ${withAgreements.map(n=>`<div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;padding:6px 0;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);flex-wrap:wrap">
        <span class="name-cell" style="font-weight:600;min-width:150px" onclick="openStudentModal('${escAttr(n)}')">${escHtml(n)}</span>
        <div style="display:flex;gap:6px;flex-wrap:wrap">${getAgreements(n).map(id=>{const a=agreementById(id);return a?`<span style="font-size:11px;border-radius:14px;padding:2px 10px;background:${a.color};color:#0f1117;font-weight:600">${a.icon} ${a.label}</span>`:'';}).join('')}</div>
      </div>`).join('')}
      </div>`;
  }

  html += block('Alumnado en riesgo', '🚨', 'var(--red)', alerts.risk, a =>
    card(a.name, `<span class="alert-chip alert-risk">${a.fails} susp.</span> <span class="alert-chip alert-risk">media ${a.avg.toFixed(1)}</span>`, 'var(--red)'));
  html += block('Caídas bruscas (≥1.5 pts)', '📉', 'var(--orange)', alerts.drop, a =>
    card(a.name, `<span class="alert-chip alert-drop">${a.drop.toFixed(1)} pts</span> respecto a la evaluación anterior`, 'var(--orange)'));
  html += block('3+ suspensos', '⚠️', 'var(--yellow)', alerts.manyFails, a =>
    card(a.name, `<span class="alert-chip alert-drop">${a.fails} suspensos</span> · media ${a.avg!==null?a.avg.toFixed(1):'—'}`, 'var(--yellow)'));
  html += block(`Muy por debajo del grupo (media grupo ${groupAvg.toFixed(1)})`, '🔻', 'var(--accent2)', alerts.belowGroup, a =>
    card(a.name, `media <strong>${a.avg.toFixed(1)}</strong> (${a.diff.toFixed(1)} vs grupo)`, 'var(--accent2)'));

  if (!html) html = '<div class="empty-state"><div class="icon">✅</div><p>Sin alertas. El grupo no presenta indicadores de riesgo destacables.</p></div>';
  document.getElementById('alerts-wrap').innerHTML = html;
}

// ============================================================
//  STUDENT MODAL (radar, vs group, notes, needed grade)
// ============================================================
function getStudentList() { const t=state.trims[getLastTrim()]; return t?t.students.map(s=>s.name):[]; }
function openStudentModal(name) { state.studentModal.name=name; renderStudentModal(); document.getElementById('student-modal').classList.add('open'); }
function navStudent(d) { const l=getStudentList(); const i=l.indexOf(state.studentModal.name)+d; if(i<0||i>=l.length)return; state.studentModal.name=l[i]; renderStudentModal(); }
function navStudentSelect(sel) { state.studentModal.name=sel.value; renderStudentModal(); }
function toggleFailsOnly() { state.studentModal.showOnlyFails=!state.studentModal.showOnlyFails; renderStudentModal(); }

function radarSVG(name, size=260) {
  const loaded = getLoadedTrims();
  // Datos del alumno por evaluación
  const studentByTrim = {};
  loaded.forEach(t=>{ studentByTrim[t] = state.trims[t].students.find(s=>s.name===name) || null; });
  const hasGrade = (sub,t)=>{ const s=studentByTrim[t]; const g=s&&s.grades[sub]; return g&&g.type==='grade'; };

  // Materias: excluir optativas y las que el alumno no tiene nota en NINGUNA evaluación
  let subs = state.subjects.filter(s=>!isOptional(s) && loaded.some(t=>hasGrade(s,t)));
  // Reordenar para que las del mismo ámbito queden contiguas
  const domains = state.config.domains||[];
  if (domains.some(d=>(d.subjects||[]).length)) {
    const ordered=[], seen=new Set();
    domains.forEach(d=>(d.subjects||[]).forEach(s=>{ if(subs.includes(s)&&!seen.has(s)){ordered.push(s);seen.add(s);} }));
    subs.forEach(s=>{ if(!seen.has(s)){ordered.push(s);seen.add(s);} });
    subs = ordered;
  }
  const n = subs.length;
  if (n<3) return '<p style="color:var(--text-muted);font-size:12px">Se necesitan al menos 3 materias con nota para el gráfico radar.</p>';
  const cx=size/2, cy=size/2, R=size/2-30;
  const ang=i=>(Math.PI*2*i/n)-Math.PI/2;
  const pt=(i,r)=>[cx+Math.cos(ang(i))*r, cy+Math.sin(ang(i))*r];
  const domainColor=sub=>{const d=subjectDomain(sub);return d?d.color:null;};

  // Sectores de fondo por ámbito
  let sectors='';
  if (domains.some(d=>(d.subjects||[]).length)) {
    subs.forEach((sub,i)=>{
      const col=domainColor(sub); if(!col) return;
      const a0=ang(i)-Math.PI/n, a1=ang(i)+Math.PI/n;
      const x0=cx+Math.cos(a0)*R, y0=cy+Math.sin(a0)*R;
      const x1=cx+Math.cos(a1)*R, y1=cy+Math.sin(a1)*R;
      sectors+=`<path d="M${cx},${cy} L${x0.toFixed(1)},${y0.toFixed(1)} A${R},${R} 0 0,1 ${x1.toFixed(1)},${y1.toFixed(1)} Z" fill="${col}" opacity="0.13"/>`;
    });
  }

  let grid='';
  [2,4,6,8,10].forEach(lv=>{ const r=R*lv/10; const p=subs.map((_,i)=>pt(i,r).join(',')).join(' '); grid+=`<polygon points="${p}" fill="none" stroke="var(--border)" stroke-width="1"/>`; });
  let axes='', labels='';
  subs.forEach((sub,i)=>{ const[x,y]=pt(i,R);
    axes+=`<line x1="${cx}" y1="${cy}" x2="${x}" y2="${y}" stroke="${domainColor(sub)||'var(--border)'}" stroke-width="${domainColor(sub)?1.2:1}" opacity="${domainColor(sub)?0.5:1}"/>`;
    const[lx,ly]=pt(i,R+14); const lcol=domainColor(sub)||getSubjectColor(subjectColorIdx(sub));
    labels+=`<text x="${lx}" y="${ly}" font-size="9" font-weight="${domainColor(sub)?'700':'400'}" fill="${lcol}" text-anchor="middle" dominant-baseline="middle">${sub}</text>`; });

  // Una línea (polígono) por evaluación cargada, con su color configurable
  const tc = state.config.trimColors || {1:'#22d3ee',2:'#a78bfa',3:'#4ade80'};

  // Media del grupo en la evaluación ordinaria (referencia), solo materias activas del alumno
  const ordTrim = state.trims[getLastTrim()];
  const groupPoly = subs.map((sub,i)=>{const a=getSubjectAvg(sub,ordTrim);return pt(i, R*((a!==null?a:0)/10)).join(',');}).join(' ');
  const groupRef = `<polygon points="${groupPoly}" fill="none" stroke="var(--text-muted)" stroke-width="1.4" stroke-dasharray="2 3" opacity="0.85"/>`;

  let polys='';
  loaded.forEach(t=>{
    const s=studentByTrim[t]; if(!s) return;
    // si una materia no tiene nota en esta evaluación, usamos 0 para no romper el polígono
    const poly = subs.map((sub,i)=>{const g=s.grades[sub];const v=(g&&g.type==='grade')?g.value:0;return pt(i,R*v/10).join(',');}).join(' ');
    const col = tc[t]||'#6c8fff';
    const isOrd = t===getLastTrim();
    polys += `<polygon points="${poly}" fill="${col}" fill-opacity="${isOrd?0.18:0.06}" stroke="${col}" stroke-width="${isOrd?2.2:1.4}" ${isOrd?'':'stroke-dasharray="4 3"'}/>`;
  });

  // Leyenda de evaluaciones (+ media de grupo)
  const evalLegend = `<div style="display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:12px;justify-content:center;margin-top:8px;font-size:11px">${loaded.map(t=>`<span style="color:${tc[t]||'#6c8fff'};font-weight:600">${t===getLastTrim()?'━':'┄'} ${trimLabel(t)}</span>`).join('')}<span style="color:var(--text-muted);font-weight:600">┈ Media del grupo</span></div>`;
  // Leyenda de ámbitos usados
  const usedDomains=(state.config.domains||[]).filter(d=>(d.subjects||[]).some(s=>subs.includes(s)));
  const domLegend = usedDomains.length ? `<div style="display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:8px;justify-content:center;margin-top:4px;font-size:10px">${usedDomains.map(d=>`<span style="color:${d.color};font-weight:600">■ ${escHtml(d.name)}</span>`).join('')}</div>` : '';

  return `<svg width="${size}" height="${size}" viewBox="0 0 ${size} ${size}">
    ${sectors}${grid}${axes}
    ${groupRef}
    ${polys}
    ${labels}</svg>${evalLegend}${domLegend}`;
}

function renderStudentModal() {
  const name = state.studentModal.name, showOnlyFails = state.studentModal.showOnlyFails;
  const loaded = getLoadedTrims(); if (!loaded.length||!name) return;
  const modal = document.getElementById('student-modal-content');
  const allStudents = getStudentList(), idx = allStudents.indexOf(name);
  const trimData = loaded.map(t=>({trim:t, student:state.trims[t].students.find(s=>s.name===name)})).filter(x=>x.student);
  const lastT = trimData[trimData.length-1];
  const avg = getStudentAvg(lastT.student), fails = getStudentFails(lastT.student);
  const trend = getTrend(trimData.map(x=>getStudentAvg(x.student)));

  const failSubjects = new Set();
  trimData.forEach(x=>Object.entries(x.student.grades).forEach(([sub,g])=>{if(g&&g.type==='grade'&&!isOptional(sub)&&isFail(g.value))failSubjects.add(sub);}));
  const subjectsToShow = showOnlyFails ? state.subjects.filter(s=>failSubjects.has(s)) : state.subjects;

  const navOptions = allStudents.map((n,i)=>`<option value="${escHtml(n)}" ${n===name?'selected':''}>${i+1}. ${escHtml(n)}</option>`).join('');

  // La nota que cuenta es la de la última evaluación (ordinaria). Los trimestres previos son informativos.
  const isOrdinaria = lastT.trim === getLastTrim();
  let html = `<button class="modal-close" onclick="closeModal('student-modal')">✕</button>
    <div class="student-nav">
      <button class="nav-arrow" onclick="navStudent(-1)" ${idx<=0?'disabled':''}>← Ant.</button>
      <select class="nav-select" onchange="navStudentSelect(this)">${navOptions}</select>
      <button class="nav-arrow" onclick="navStudent(1)" ${idx>=allStudents.length-1?'disabled':''}>Sig. →</button>
      <span class="nav-counter">${idx+1} / ${allStudents.length}</span>
    </div>
    <div class="modal-header"><div class="student-header"><div>
      <div class="student-name">${escHtml(name)}</div>
      <div class="student-badges">
        ${avg!==null?`<span class="badge ${isPass(avg)?'badge-green':'badge-red'}">Media ${trimLabel(lastT.trim)}: ${avg.toFixed(2)}</span>`:''}
        ${fails>0?`<span class="badge badge-red">⚠ ${fails} susp.</span>`:'<span class="badge badge-green">✓ Sin susp.</span>'}
        <span class="badge badge-blue ${trend.class}">${trend.icon} ${trend.label}</span>
        ${loaded.length>1?`<span class="badge badge-purple">${loaded.length} eval. cargadas</span>`:''}
      </div></div>
      <div class="avg-badge" style="border-color:${avgColor(avg)};color:${avgColor(avg)};font-size:1.3rem;width:60px;height:60px">${avg!==null?avg.toFixed(1):'—'}</div>
    </div></div>`;

  // Radar
  html += `<div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:16px;align-items:center">
    <div class="radar-wrap">${radarSVG(name)}</div>
    <div>
      <div class="subject-card" style="border-top-color:var(--green)">
        <div style="font-size:12px;color:var(--text-muted);margin-bottom:8px">✅ Acuerdos de la junta</div>
        <div id="modal-agreements">${agreementChipsModal(name)}</div>
      </div>
      <div class="subject-card" style="border-top-color:var(--cyan);margin-top:12px">
        <div style="font-size:12px;color:var(--text-muted);margin-bottom:8px">📝 Comentario para el acta</div>
        <textarea class="note-area" id="note-input" placeholder="Observaciones, acuerdos de la junta, medidas..." oninput="onNoteInput('${escAttr(name)}')">${escHtml(state.config.notes[name]||'')}</textarea>
        <div class="note-saved" id="note-saved-ind"></div>
      </div>
    </div></div>`;

  // Evolution toggle
  html += `<div style="display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;margin:20px 0 12px;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:8px">
    <div class="section-title" style="font-size:1rem;margin-bottom:0">Evolución por materia</div>
    <button class="toggle-btn ${showOnlyFails?'active':''}" onclick="toggleFailsOnly()"><span class="dot"></span>${showOnlyFails?'⚠ Solo suspensos':'📚 Todas'}</button></div>`;

  if (!subjectsToShow.length) html += `<div style="text-align:center;padding:20px;color:var(--green)">✓ Sin materias suspensas</div>`;
  else {
    html += '<div class="evolution-grid">';
    subjectsToShow.forEach(sub=>{
      const color=getSubjectColor(subjectColorIdx(sub));
      const sg=trimData.map(x=>({trim:x.trim,grade:x.student.grades[sub]||null}));
      const st=getTrend(sg.map(x=>x.grade&&x.grade.type==='grade'?x.grade.value:null));
      const hasFail=sg.some(x=>x.grade&&x.grade.type==='grade'&&isFail(x.grade.value));
      // vs group
      const lastG = lastT.student.grades[sub];
      const gAvg = getSubjectAvg(sub, state.trims[lastT.trim]);
      let vsTxt='';
      if (lastG&&lastG.type==='grade'&&gAvg!==null){ const d=lastG.value-gAvg; vsTxt=`<div style="font-size:9px;margin-top:4px;color:${d>=0?'var(--green)':'var(--red)'}">${d>=0?'+':''}${d.toFixed(1)} vs grupo</div>`; }
      html += `<div class="evo-card" style="border-left:3px solid ${color}${hasFail?';background:rgba(248,113,113,0.04)':''}">
        <div class="subject-name" style="color:${color}">${subName(sub)}${hasFail?' <span style="color:var(--red)">●</span>':''}</div>
        <div class="evo-grades">${sg.map((x,i)=>`<div class="evo-grade"><span class="trimestre-badge t${x.trim}" style="font-size:9px">${trimLabelShort(x.trim)}</span>${gradeDisplay(x.grade||{type:'absent',value:null})}</div>${i<sg.length-1?'<span style="color:var(--border)">→</span>':''}`).join('')}<span class="trend-arrow ${st.class}">${st.icon}</span></div>
        ${vsTxt}</div>`;
    });
    html += '</div>';
  }

  // Per-trim summary
  if (trimData.length>1) {
    html += `<div class="section-title" style="font-size:1rem;margin-top:24px">Evolución por evaluación <span style="font-size:12px;font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;font-weight:400;color:var(--text-muted)">(las previas son informativas)</span></div><div style="display:flex;gap:12px;flex-wrap:wrap">`;
    trimData.forEach((x,i)=>{const a=getStudentAvg(x.student),f=getStudentFails(x.student);const esOrd=i===trimData.length-1;
      html += `<div style="background:var(--surface2);border:1px solid ${esOrd?'var(--accent)':'var(--border)'};border-radius:10px;padding:14px;flex:1;min-width:130px;text-align:center">
        <span class="trimestre-badge t${x.trim}" style="margin-bottom:8px;display:inline-block">${trimLabel(x.trim)}</span>
        <div style="font-size:1.6rem;font-weight:700;color:${avgColor(a)};margin:8px 0">${a!==null?a.toFixed(1):'—'}</div>
        <div style="font-size:12px;color:${f>0?'var(--red)':'var(--green)'}">${f>0?`⚠ ${f} susp.`:'✓ Aprobado'}</div></div>`;});
    html += '</div>';
  }

  // Resumen de medidas / decisión de la junta
  const mz = state.config.measures[name] || {};
  const att = state.config.attendance[name];
  const segCount = (mz.seguimiento||[]).length;
  const motCount = Object.keys(mz.rendimiento||{}).length;
  const decision = mz.decision ? MEASURES_DECISION.find(d=>d.id===mz.decision) : null;
  html += `<div class="section-title" style="font-size:1rem;margin-top:24px">Sesión de evaluación · medidas y decisión</div>
    <div style="background:var(--surface2);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:10px;padding:14px">
      <div style="display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:8px;align-items:center;margin-bottom:10px">
        ${decision?`<span class="badge" style="background:${decision.color};color:#fff">${decision.label}</span>`:'<span style="font-size:12px;color:var(--text-muted)">Sin decisión registrada</span>'}
        ${segCount?`<span class="badge badge-blue">${segCount} medida${segCount>1?'s':''}</span>`:''}
        ${motCount?`<span class="badge badge-orange">${motCount} motivo${motCount>1?'s':''}</span>`:''}
        ${att?`<span class="badge badge-purple">${att.uDays+att.uSlots} falta(s) injust.</span>`:''}
      </div>
      <button class="btn btn-primary btn-sm" onclick="openMeasuresModal('${escAttr(name)}')">📋 Editar medidas, motivos y decisión</button>
    </div>`;

  // Per-student actions
  html += `<div style="margin-top:24px;text-align:center;display:flex;gap:8px;justify-content:center;flex-wrap:wrap">
    <button class="btn btn-secondary btn-sm" onclick="openFamilyMessage('${escAttr(name)}')">✉️ Mensaje a la familia</button>
    <button class="btn btn-primary btn-sm" onclick="exportFullStudentReport('${escAttr(name)}')">📊 Informe completo</button>
    <button class="btn btn-danger btn-sm" onclick="exportStudentPDF('${escAttr(name)}')">📄 Ficha rápida (PDF)</button>
  </div>`;

  modal.innerHTML = html;
}

// ====== MODAL DE MEDIDAS / MOTIVOS / DECISIÓN ======
// Registro de textos de ayuda: evitamos incrustar el texto en el atributo onclick
// (los apóstrofes/comillas/saltos de línea romperían el HTML). Pasamos solo una clave.
const _helpTexts = {};
let _helpSeq = 0;
function helpBtn(text){ const k='h'+(_helpSeq++); _helpTexts[k]=text; return `<button type="button" class="help-btn" onclick="showHelp('${k}')" title="¿Qué es?">?</button>`; }
function showHelp(k){ const t=_helpTexts[k]; if(t) alert(t); }
function getMeasures(name){ const m=state.config.measures[name]||{}; m.seguimiento=m.seguimiento||[]; m.rendimiento=m.rendimiento||{}; return m; }
function openMeasuresModal(name){
  const m=getMeasures(name);
  const att=state.config.attendance[name]||{jDays:'',uDays:'',jSlots:'',uSlots:'',delays:''};
  const subOptions = state.subjects.map(s=>`<option value="${escAttr(s)}">${subName(s)}</option>`).join('');
  const failSubs = (()=>{const last=state.trims[getLastTrim()].students.find(s=>s.name===name);if(!last)return [];return Object.entries(last.grades).filter(([s,g])=>g.type==='grade'&&!isOptional(s)&&isFail(g.value)).map(([s])=>subName(s));})();

  let html=`<button class="modal-close" onclick="closeModal('measures-modal');renderStudentModal()">✕</button>
    <div class="modal-header"><h3 style="font-family:'DM Serif Display',serif;font-size:1.4rem">📋 Sesión de evaluación</h3>
      <p style="color:var(--text-muted);margin-top:4px;font-size:13px">${escHtml(name)}</p></div>`;

  // 1) MEDIDAS ADOPTADAS / SEGUIMIENTO
  html+=`<div class="section-title" style="font-size:1rem">Medidas adoptadas / Seguimiento</div>
    <div style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:6px;margin-bottom:14px">`;
  MEASURES_SEGUIMIENTO.forEach(opt=>{
    const on=m.seguimiento.includes(opt.id);
    html+=`<div class="measure-row"><label style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;flex:1;cursor:pointer"><input type="checkbox" ${on?'checked':''} onchange="toggleMeasure('${escAttr(name)}','${opt.id}')"> <span>${opt.label}</span></label> ${helpBtn(opt.help)}</div>`;
  });
  html+=`</div>
    <textarea class="note-area" id="meas-seg-text" placeholder="Detalles del seguimiento (ej.: durante la 2ª evaluación ha tenido refuerzo y ha evolucionado positivamente)…" oninput="saveMeasField('${escAttr(name)}','seguimientoText',this.value)">${escHtml(m.seguimientoText||'')}</textarea>`;

  // 2) RENDIMIENTO ACADÉMICO
  html+=`<div class="section-title" style="font-size:1rem;margin-top:22px">Rendimiento académico</div>
    <div style="font-size:12px;color:var(--text-muted);margin-bottom:6px">Materias suspensas: <strong style="color:var(--red)">${failSubs.length?failSubs.join(', '):'ninguna'}</strong></div>
    <div style="font-size:12px;color:var(--text-muted);margin-bottom:10px">Marca los motivos e indica las materias afectadas:</div>
    <div style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:8px">`;
  MEASURES_MOTIVOS.forEach(opt=>{
    const sel=m.rendimiento[opt.id]; const on=!!sel;
    html+=`<div style="background:var(--surface2);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:8px;padding:8px 10px">
      <label class="measure-row" style="margin-bottom:${on?'8px':'0'}"><input type="checkbox" ${on?'checked':''} onchange="toggleMotivo('${escAttr(name)}','${opt.id}')"> <span>${opt.label}</span> ${helpBtn(opt.help)}</label>
      <div id="motivo-subs-${opt.id}" style="display:${on?'flex':'none'};flex-wrap:wrap;gap:5px;margin-top:6px">
        ${state.subjects.map(s=>{const act=(sel||[]).includes(s);return `<button onclick="toggleMotivoSubject('${escAttr(name)}','${opt.id}','${escAttr(s)}')" style="font-size:11px;border-radius:12px;padding:3px 9px;cursor:pointer;border:1px solid ${act?'var(--accent)':'var(--border)'};background:${act?'var(--accent)':'transparent'};color:${act?'#fff':'var(--text-muted)'};font-weight:600">${s}</button>`;}).join('')}
      </div>
    </div>`;
  });
  html+=`</div>
    <textarea class="note-area" style="margin-top:10px" placeholder="Otros motivos…" oninput="saveMeasField('${escAttr(name)}','motivosOtros',this.value)">${escHtml(m.motivosOtros||'')}</textarea>`;

  // 3) FALTAS DE ASISTENCIA
  html+=`<div class="section-title" style="font-size:1rem;margin-top:22px">Faltas de asistencia ${helpBtn('Puedes rellenarlas a mano o importarlas desde el JSON de AbsentApp con el botón «Importar faltas». Días = jornadas completas; Tramos = ausencias por horas sueltas.')}</div>
    <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit,minmax(150px,1fr));gap:10px;margin-bottom:10px">
      ${[['jDays','Días justificados'],['uDays','Días injustificados'],['jSlots','Tramos justificados'],['uSlots','Tramos injustificados'],['delays','Retrasos']].map(([k,lbl])=>`<div><label style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text-muted)">${lbl}</label><input type="number" min="0" value="${att[k]??''}" onchange="saveAttendance('${escAttr(name)}','${k}',this.value)" style="width:100%;background:var(--surface2);border:1px solid var(--border);color:var(--text);border-radius:6px;padding:6px"></div>`).join('')}
    </div>
    <label class="btn btn-secondary btn-sm" style="cursor:pointer">📥 Importar faltas (JSON AbsentApp)<input type="file" accept=".json" onchange="importAttendance(event)" style="display:none"></label>`;

  // 4) DECISIÓN
  html+=`<div class="section-title" style="font-size:1rem;margin-top:22px">Decisión</div>
    <div style="display:flex;gap:10px;flex-wrap:wrap">`;
  MEASURES_DECISION.forEach(opt=>{
    const on=m.decision===opt.id;
    html+=`<button onclick="setDecision('${escAttr(name)}','${opt.id}')" class="trim-option ${on?'selected':''}" style="flex:1;min-width:120px;border-color:${on?opt.color:'var(--border)'}">
      <div class="opt-label" style="color:${on?opt.color:'var(--text)'}">${opt.label}</div></button> ${helpBtn(opt.help)}`;
  });
  html+=`</div>
    <textarea class="note-area" style="margin-top:10px" placeholder="Observaciones de la decisión (ej.: resultado de la votación)…" oninput="saveMeasField('${escAttr(name)}','decisionText',this.value)">${escHtml(m.decisionText||'')}</textarea>`;

  html+=`<div style="margin-top:20px;text-align:right"><button class="btn btn-primary btn-sm" onclick="closeModal('measures-modal');renderStudentModal()">Hecho</button></div>`;

  document.getElementById('measures-modal-content').innerHTML=html;
  document.getElementById('measures-modal').classList.add('open');
}
function ensureMeasures(name){ if(!state.config.measures[name]) state.config.measures[name]={seguimiento:[],rendimiento:{}}; return state.config.measures[name]; }
function toggleMeasure(name,id){ const m=ensureMeasures(name); m.seguimiento=m.seguimiento||[]; const i=m.seguimiento.indexOf(id); if(i>=0)m.seguimiento.splice(i,1); else m.seguimiento.push(id); autoSave(); }
function toggleMotivo(name,id){ const m=ensureMeasures(name); m.rendimiento=m.rendimiento||{}; if(m.rendimiento[id])delete m.rendimiento[id]; else m.rendimiento[id]=[]; autoSave(); const el=document.getElementById('motivo-subs-'+id); if(el)el.style.display=m.rendimiento[id]?'flex':'none'; }
function toggleMotivoSubject(name,id,sub){ const m=ensureMeasures(name); const arr=m.rendimiento[id]||(m.rendimiento[id]=[]); const i=arr.indexOf(sub); if(i>=0)arr.splice(i,1); else arr.push(sub); autoSave(); openMeasuresModal(name); }
function setDecision(name,id){ const m=ensureMeasures(name); m.decision=(m.decision===id?null:id); autoSave(); openMeasuresModal(name); }
function saveMeasField(name,field,val){ const m=ensureMeasures(name); m[field]=val; autoSave(); }
function saveAttendance(name,field,val){ state.config.attendance=state.config.attendance||{}; const a=state.config.attendance[name]||(state.config.attendance[name]={}); a[field]=val===''?0:(parseInt(val)||0); autoSave(); }

let noteTimer=null;
function onNoteInput(name) {
  state.config.notes[name] = document.getElementById('note-input').value;
  document.getElementById('note-saved-ind').textContent = 'Guardando…';
  clearTimeout(noteTimer);
  noteTimer = setTimeout(()=>{ autoSave(); document.getElementById('note-saved-ind').textContent='✓ Guardado'; setTimeout(()=>{const e=document.getElementById('note-saved-ind');if(e)e.textContent='';},1500); }, 600);
}

// ============================================================
//  CONFIG MODAL (weights, optionals, rename)
// ============================================================
function openConfigModal() {
  const c = state.config;
  const loaded = getLoadedTrims();
  let html = `<button class="modal-close" onclick="closeModal('config-modal')">✕</button>
    <div class="modal-header"><h3 style="font-family:'DM Serif Display',serif;font-size:1.4rem">⚙️ Configuración</h3></div>`;

  // Apariencia
  const tc=state.config.trimColors||{1:'#22d3ee',2:'#a78bfa',3:'#4ade80'};
  html += `<div class="section-title" style="font-size:1rem">Apariencia</div>
    <div style="display:flex;gap:10px;margin-bottom:16px">
      <button class="trim-option ${!state.config.lightMode?'selected':''}" onclick="setTheme(false)" style="flex:1"><div class="opt-icon">🌙</div><div class="opt-label">Modo oscuro</div></button>
      <button class="trim-option ${state.config.lightMode?'selected':''}" onclick="setTheme(true)" style="flex:1"><div class="opt-icon">☀️</div><div class="opt-label">Modo luminoso</div></button>
    </div>
    <div style="margin-bottom:20px">
      <label style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text-muted)">Color de cada evaluación en el gráfico radar</label>
      <div style="display:flex;gap:14px;margin-top:8px;flex-wrap:wrap">
        ${[1,2,3].map(t=>`<label style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;font-size:12px;cursor:pointer"><input type="color" value="${tc[t]}" onchange="setTrimColor(${t},this.value)" style="width:30px;height:26px;border:none;background:none;cursor:pointer;padding:0"> ${trimLabel(t)}</label>`).join('')}
      </div>
    </div>`;

  // Grading criteria
  html += `<div class="section-title" style="font-size:1rem">Criterio de calificación</div>
    <div style="display:flex;gap:16px;align-items:center;flex-wrap:wrap;margin-bottom:14px">
      <div><label style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text-muted)">Nota mínima para aprobar</label>
        <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px"><input type="number" min="0" max="10" step="0.5" value="${c.passThreshold}" id="cfg-threshold" style="width:70px;background:var(--surface2);border:1px solid var(--border);color:var(--text);border-radius:6px;padding:6px"></div></div>
      <label style="font-size:12px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;cursor:pointer;margin-top:14px"><input type="checkbox" ${c.showLabels?'checked':''} id="cfg-showlabels"> Mostrar etiqueta (IN/SF/BI/NT/SB) en las notas</label>
    </div>
    <details style="margin-bottom:20px"><summary style="cursor:pointer;font-size:12px;color:var(--text-muted)">Editar bandas cualitativas (Insuficiente, Suficiente…)</summary>
      <div style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:6px;margin-top:10px" id="bands-editor">
      ${c.bands.map((b,i)=>`<div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;background:var(--surface2);border-radius:8px;padding:6px 10px">
        <span style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text-muted)">desde</span>
        <input type="number" min="0" max="10" step="0.5" value="${b.min}" id="band-min-${i}" style="width:55px;background:var(--surface);border:1px solid var(--border);color:var(--text);border-radius:6px;padding:4px">
        <input type="text" value="${escHtml(b.label)}" id="band-label-${i}" placeholder="Etiqueta" style="flex:1;background:var(--surface);border:1px solid var(--border);color:var(--text);border-radius:6px;padding:4px 8px;font-size:12px">
        <input type="text" value="${escHtml(b.abbr)}" id="band-abbr-${i}" placeholder="Abr." maxlength="4" style="width:55px;background:var(--surface);border:1px solid var(--border);color:var(--text);border-radius:6px;padding:4px;font-size:12px;text-align:center">
      </div>`).join('')}
      </div>
      <p style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text-muted);margin-top:8px">Cada banda aplica desde su valor mínimo hacia arriba. Ordénalas de mayor a menor.</p>
    </details>`;

  // Nota informativa sobre los trimestres (no hay media ponderada)
  html += `<div style="background:rgba(34,211,238,0.08);border:1px solid rgba(34,211,238,0.25);border-radius:10px;padding:12px;margin-bottom:20px;font-size:12px;color:var(--text);line-height:1.5">
    ℹ️ La nota que cuenta es la de la <strong>evaluación ordinaria</strong> (la última cargada). Las evaluaciones anteriores son <strong>solo informativas</strong> para ver la evolución: no se calcula ninguna media entre trimestres.</div>`;

  // Optionals + rename
  html += `<div class="section-title" style="font-size:1rem">Materias</div>
    <p style="font-size:12px;color:var(--text-muted);margin-bottom:10px">Marca como optativa (◦) para excluir de la media. Edita el nombre completo si lo deseas.</p>
    <div style="max-height:280px;overflow-y:auto;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:6px">
    ${state.subjects.map(sub=>{const color=getSubjectColor(subjectColorIdx(sub));return `<div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;background:var(--surface2);border-radius:8px;padding:8px 10px">
      <span class="subject-color-dot" style="background:${color}"></span>
      <span style="font-weight:700;font-size:12px;min-width:50px">${sub}</span>
      <input type="text" placeholder="Nombre completo..." value="${escHtml(c.subjectNames[sub]||'')}" id="sname-${escAttr(sub)}" style="flex:1;background:var(--surface);border:1px solid var(--border);color:var(--text);border-radius:6px;padding:5px 8px;font-size:12px">
      <label style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:4px;font-size:11px;cursor:pointer;white-space:nowrap"><input type="checkbox" ${isOptional(sub)?'checked':''} id="sopt-${escAttr(sub)}"> opt.</label>
    </div>`;}).join('')}
    </div>`;

  // Ámbitos (agrupación de materias)
  const DOMAIN_COLORS=['#6c8fff','#f472b6','#4ade80','#fbbf24','#a78bfa','#22d3ee','#fb923c','#34d399'];
  html += `<div class="section-title" style="font-size:1rem">Ámbitos de materias</div>
    <p style="font-size:12px;color:var(--text-muted);margin-bottom:10px">Agrupa materias por ámbito (Científico-Técnico, Lingüístico, etc.) para identificarlos visualmente en el gráfico radar. Tú eliges los nombres y qué materias incluye cada uno.</p>
    <div id="domains-editor" style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:10px">`;
  (state.config.domains||[]).forEach((dom,di)=>{
    html += `<div style="background:var(--surface2);border:1px solid var(--border);border-left:4px solid ${dom.color};border-radius:8px;padding:10px">
      <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;margin-bottom:8px">
        <input type="color" value="${dom.color}" onchange="updateDomain(${di},'color',this.value)" style="width:32px;height:28px;border:none;background:none;cursor:pointer;padding:0">
        <input type="text" value="${escHtml(dom.name)}" placeholder="Nombre del ámbito" onchange="updateDomain(${di},'name',this.value)" style="flex:1;background:var(--surface);border:1px solid var(--border);color:var(--text);border-radius:6px;padding:5px 8px;font-size:13px;font-weight:600">
        <button class="btn btn-danger btn-sm" onclick="removeDomain(${di})" title="Eliminar ámbito">🗑</button>
      </div>
      <div style="display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:5px">
        ${state.subjects.map(sub=>{const on=(dom.subjects||[]).includes(sub);return `<button onclick="toggleDomainSubject(${di},'${escAttr(sub)}')" style="font-size:11px;border-radius:12px;padding:3px 9px;cursor:pointer;border:1px solid ${on?dom.color:'var(--border)'};background:${on?dom.color:'transparent'};color:${on?'#fff':'var(--text-muted)'};font-weight:600">${sub}</button>`;}).join('')}
      </div>
    </div>`;
  });
  html += `</div>
    <div style="display:flex;gap:8px;margin-top:12px;flex-wrap:wrap;align-items:center">
      <select id="preset-domain-select" style="background:var(--surface2);border:1px solid var(--border);color:var(--text);border-radius:8px;padding:7px 10px;font-size:12px;min-width:200px">
        <option value="">Añadir ámbito predefinido…</option>
        ${PRESET_DOMAINS.map((p,i)=>`<option value="${i}">${p.icon} ${p.name}</option>`).join('')}
      </select>
      <button class="btn btn-secondary btn-sm" onclick="addPresetDomain()">+ Añadir predefinido</button>
      <button class="btn btn-secondary btn-sm" onclick="addDomain('${DOMAIN_COLORS[(state.config.domains||[]).length % DOMAIN_COLORS.length]}')">+ Ámbito personalizado</button>
    </div>
    <p style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text-muted);margin-top:8px">Los predefinidos vienen con nombre y color; solo tienes que marcar sus materias. Puedes editarlos como cualquier otro.</p>`;

  html += `<div style="margin-top:20px;text-align:right;display:flex;gap:8px;justify-content:flex-end">
    <button class="btn btn-secondary btn-sm" onclick="closeModal('config-modal')">Cancelar</button>
    <button class="btn btn-primary btn-sm" onclick="saveConfig()">Guardar cambios</button></div>`;
  document.getElementById('config-modal-content').innerHTML = html;
  document.getElementById('config-modal').classList.add('open');
}
// Guarda los campos de texto/checkbox en curso antes de re-renderizar el modal de config
function captureConfigForm() {
  const th=document.getElementById('cfg-threshold'); if(th&&!isNaN(parseFloat(th.value))) state.config.passThreshold=Math.min(10,Math.max(0,parseFloat(th.value)));
  const sl=document.getElementById('cfg-showlabels'); if(sl) state.config.showLabels=sl.checked;
  const newBands=[];
  (state.config.bands||[]).forEach((b,i)=>{const m=document.getElementById('band-min-'+i),l=document.getElementById('band-label-'+i),a=document.getElementById('band-abbr-'+i);if(m&&l)newBands.push({min:parseFloat(m.value)||0,label:l.value.trim()||b.label,abbr:(a.value.trim()||b.abbr).toUpperCase()});});
  if(newBands.length){newBands.sort((x,y)=>y.min-x.min);state.config.bands=newBands;}
  document.querySelectorAll('#config-modal-content input[id^="sname-"]').forEach(el=>{
    const sub=el.id.slice(6); if (el.value.trim()) state.config.subjectNames[sub]=el.value.trim(); else delete state.config.subjectNames[sub];
  });
  state.config.optional=[];
  document.querySelectorAll('#config-modal-content input[id^="sopt-"]').forEach(el=>{ if (el.checked) state.config.optional.push(el.id.slice(5)); });
}
function addDomain(color){ captureConfigForm(); state.config.domains=state.config.domains||[]; state.config.domains.push({name:'Nuevo ámbito',color:color||'#6c8fff',subjects:[]}); openConfigModal(); }
function removeDomain(i){ captureConfigForm(); state.config.domains.splice(i,1); openConfigModal(); }
function updateDomain(i,key,val){ state.config.domains[i][key]=val; }
function toggleDomainSubject(i,sub){
  captureConfigForm();
  const arr=state.config.domains[i].subjects||(state.config.domains[i].subjects=[]);
  const j=arr.indexOf(sub); if(j>=0)arr.splice(j,1); else arr.push(sub);
  openConfigModal();
}
// Devuelve el ámbito al que pertenece una materia (o null)
function subjectDomain(sub){ return (state.config.domains||[]).find(d=>(d.subjects||[]).includes(sub)) || null; }

function saveConfig() {
  // Threshold + labels
  const th=parseFloat(document.getElementById('cfg-threshold').value); if (!isNaN(th)) state.config.passThreshold=Math.min(10,Math.max(0,th));
  state.config.showLabels=document.getElementById('cfg-showlabels').checked;
  // Bands
  const newBands=[];
  state.config.bands.forEach((b,i)=>{
    const minEl=document.getElementById('band-min-'+i), labEl=document.getElementById('band-label-'+i), abbrEl=document.getElementById('band-abbr-'+i);
    if (minEl&&labEl) newBands.push({ min: parseFloat(minEl.value)||0, label: labEl.value.trim()||b.label, abbr: (abbrEl.value.trim()||b.abbr).toUpperCase() });
  });
  if (newBands.length) { newBands.sort((a,b)=>b.min-a.min); state.config.bands=newBands; }
  // Optionals + names
  state.config.optional=[]; state.config.subjectNames={};
  const checks=[...document.querySelectorAll('#config-modal-content input[type=checkbox]')];
  const texts=[...document.querySelectorAll('#config-modal-content input[type=text]')];
  state.subjects.forEach(sub=>{
    const optEl=checks.find(e=>e.id==='sopt-'+sub);
    const nameEl=texts.find(e=>e.id==='sname-'+sub);
    if (optEl&&optEl.checked) state.config.optional.push(sub);
    if (nameEl&&nameEl.value.trim()) state.config.subjectNames[sub]=nameEl.value.trim();
  });
  closeModal('config-modal');
  renderAll(); autoSave();
}

// ============================================================
//  EXPORT MENU + EXPORTS
// ============================================================
function openExportMenu() {
  document.getElementById('export-modal-content').innerHTML = `<button class="modal-close" onclick="closeModal('export-modal')">✕</button>
    <div class="modal-header"><h3 style="font-family:'DM Serif Display',serif;font-size:1.4rem">📤 Exportar</h3></div>
    <div style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:10px">
      <div style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text-muted);text-transform:uppercase;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:0.5px">Informes completos (PDF)</div>
      <button class="btn btn-primary" onclick="closeModal('export-modal');exportFullGroupReport()">📊 Informe completo del grupo</button>
      <button class="btn btn-primary" onclick="closeModal('export-modal');exportAllStudentReports()">👥 Individuales · un solo PDF</button>
      <button class="btn btn-primary" onclick="closeModal('export-modal');exportStudentReportsSeparate()">🗂️ Individuales · un archivo por alumno</button>
      <hr style="border-color:var(--border);margin:6px 0">
      <div style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text-muted);text-transform:uppercase;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:0.5px">Actas y listas</div>
      <button class="btn btn-success" onclick="closeModal('export-modal');exportTxt()">💾 Acta completa (TXT)</button>
      <button class="btn btn-danger" onclick="closeModal('export-modal');exportPDF()">📄 Acta de notas (PDF)</button>
      <button class="btn btn-secondary" onclick="closeModal('export-modal');exportFailsList()">⚠️ Lista de alumnos con suspensos (TXT)</button>
      <button class="btn btn-secondary" onclick="closeModal('export-modal');exportAgreements()">✅ Acta de acuerdos de la junta (TXT)</button>
      <button class="btn btn-secondary" onclick="closeModal('export-modal');window.print()">🖨️ Imprimir vista actual</button>
      <hr style="border-color:var(--border);margin:6px 0">
      <label class="btn btn-secondary" style="cursor:pointer">🗓️ Importar faltas de asistencia (JSON AbsentApp)<input type="file" accept=".json" onchange="closeModal('export-modal');importAttendance(event)" style="display:none"></label>
      <p style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text-muted)">Sube el JSON exportado por AbsentApp. Las faltas se reparten por alumno emparejando los nombres.</p>
      <button class="btn btn-secondary" onclick="closeModal('export-modal');exportSessionJSON()">📦 Guardar sesión (JSON)</button>
      <p style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text-muted)">La sesión incluye notas, configuración y todos los datos para retomar otro día.</p>
    </div>`;
  document.getElementById('export-modal').classList.add('open');
}

function exportTxt() {
  const loaded=getLoadedTrims(); if (!loaded.length) return;
  let txt='='.repeat(60)+'\nACTA DE EVALUACIÓN\n'+'='.repeat(60)+'\n\n';
  txt+=`Registros: ${loaded.map(t=>trimLabel(t)).join(', ')}\nGenerado: ${new Date().toLocaleDateString('es-ES')}\n`;
  loaded.forEach(t=>{const td=state.trims[t];
    txt+=`\n${'─'.repeat(50)}\n${trimLabel(t).toUpperCase()}\n${'─'.repeat(50)}\n`;
    td.students.forEach(s=>{const a=getStudentAvg(s),f=getStudentFails(s);
      txt+=`\n${s.name}\n  Media: ${a!==null?a.toFixed(2):'—'} | Suspensos: ${f}\n  `;
      td.subjects.forEach(sub=>{const g=s.grades[sub];txt+=`${sub}: ${!g||g.type==='absent'?'—':g.type==='np'?'NP':g.value}  `;});
      if (state.config.notes[s.name]) txt+=`\n  Obs.: ${state.config.notes[s.name]}`;
      const ag=agreementsText(s.name); if (ag) txt+=`\n  Acuerdos: ${ag}`;
      txt+='\n';});
    txt+='\n  RESUMEN MATERIAS:\n';
    td.subjects.forEach(sub=>{const gs=td.students.map(s=>s.grades[sub]).filter(g=>g&&g.type==='grade');const p=gs.filter(g=>isPass(g.value)).length;const a=gs.length?(gs.reduce((x,g)=>x+g.value,0)/gs.length).toFixed(2):'—';txt+=`  ${subName(sub)}: ${p}/${gs.length} aprob. (${gs.length?((p/gs.length)*100).toFixed(0):0}%) | Media: ${a}\n`;});
  });
  downloadBlob(txt,'acta_evaluacion.txt','text/plain');
}

function exportAgreements() {
  const withAg = Object.keys(state.config.agreements||{}).filter(n=>getAgreements(n).length);
  let txt='ACTA DE ACUERDOS DE LA JUNTA DE EVALUACIÓN\n'+'='.repeat(45)+'\n\n';
  txt+=`Fecha: ${new Date().toLocaleDateString('es-ES')}\n\n`;
  if (!withAg.length) { txt+='(No se han registrado acuerdos)\n'; }
  else withAg.forEach(n=>{
    txt+=`${n}\n  Acuerdos: ${agreementsText(n)}\n`;
    if (state.config.notes[n]) txt+=`  Observaciones: ${state.config.notes[n]}\n`;
    txt+='\n';
  });
  downloadBlob(txt,'acta_acuerdos.txt','text/plain');
}

function exportFailsList() {
  const td=state.trims[getLastTrim()];
  let txt='ALUMNADO CON MATERIAS SUSPENSAS\n'+'='.repeat(40)+'\n\n';
  td.students.filter(s=>getStudentFails(s)>0).forEach(s=>{
    const subs=Object.entries(s.grades).filter(([sub,g])=>g.type==='grade'&&!isOptional(sub)&&isFail(g.value)).map(([sub,g])=>`${subName(sub)} (${g.value})`);
    txt+=`${s.name} — media ${getStudentAvg(s).toFixed(1)}\n  Suspensos: ${subs.join(', ')}\n`;
    if (state.config.notes[s.name]) txt+=`  Obs.: ${state.config.notes[s.name]}\n`;
    const ag=agreementsText(s.name); if (ag) txt+=`  Acuerdos: ${ag}\n`;
    txt+='\n';
  });
  downloadBlob(txt,'lista_refuerzo.txt','text/plain');
}

function exportPDF() {
  const { jsPDF }=window.jspdf; const doc=new jsPDF({orientation:'landscape',unit:'mm',format:'a4'});
  const loaded=getLoadedTrims(); if(!loaded.length)return;
  const td=state.trims[getLastTrim()];
  doc.setFont('helvetica','bold');doc.setFontSize(18);doc.text('Acta de Evaluación Académica',14,18);
  doc.setFont('helvetica','normal');doc.setFontSize(10);doc.setTextColor(100);
  doc.text(`Registros: ${loaded.map(t=>trimLabel(t)).join(', ')} | ${new Date().toLocaleDateString('es-ES')}`,14,25);doc.setTextColor(0);
  const cols=['Alumno/a','Media','Susp.',...td.subjects];
  const rows=td.students.map(s=>{const a=getStudentAvg(s);const c=[s.name,a!==null?a.toFixed(1):'—',getStudentFails(s).toString()];
    td.subjects.forEach(sub=>{const g=s.grades[sub];c.push(!g||g.type==='absent'?'—':g.type==='np'?'NP':(g.value%1===0?g.value.toString():g.value.toFixed(1)));});return c;});
  doc.autoTable({head:[cols],body:rows,startY:30,styles:{fontSize:7,cellPadding:2},headStyles:{fillColor:[26,31,52],textColor:[200,210,255]},
    didParseCell:d=>{if(d.section==='body'&&d.column.index>2){const v=parseFloat(d.cell.raw);if(!isNaN(v)){if(v<5){d.cell.styles.textColor=[220,80,80];d.cell.styles.fontStyle='bold';}else if(v>=9)d.cell.styles.textColor=[80,200,100];}}}});
  let y=doc.lastAutoTable.finalY+10;doc.setFont('helvetica','bold');doc.setFontSize(12);doc.text('Resumen por Materias',14,y);y+=6;
  const sd=td.subjects.map(sub=>{const gs=td.students.map(s=>s.grades[sub]).filter(g=>g&&g.type==='grade');const p=gs.filter(g=>isPass(g.value)).length;const a=gs.length?(gs.reduce((x,g)=>x+g.value,0)/gs.length).toFixed(2):'—';const pct=gs.length?((p/gs.length)*100).toFixed(0)+'%':'—';return[subName(sub),gs.length.toString(),p.toString(),(gs.length-p).toString(),a,pct];});
  doc.autoTable({head:[['Materia','Eval.','Aprob.','Susp.','Media','% Aprob.']],body:sd,startY:y,styles:{fontSize:8,cellPadding:2},headStyles:{fillColor:[26,31,52],textColor:[200,210,255]},
    didParseCell:d=>{if(d.section==='body'&&d.column.index===5){const v=parseFloat(d.cell.raw);if(!isNaN(v)){d.cell.styles.fontStyle='bold';d.cell.styles.textColor=v>=70?[80,200,100]:v>=50?[200,150,50]:[220,80,80];}}}});
  doc.save('acta_evaluacion.pdf');
}

function exportStudentPDF(name) {
  const { jsPDF }=window.jspdf; const doc=new jsPDF({unit:'mm',format:'a4'});
  const loaded=getLoadedTrims();
  const trimData=loaded.map(t=>({trim:t,student:state.trims[t].students.find(s=>s.name===name)})).filter(x=>x.student);
  const last=trimData[trimData.length-1].student;
  doc.setFont('helvetica','bold');doc.setFontSize(20);doc.text('Ficha de Evaluación',14,20);
  doc.setFontSize(16);doc.setTextColor(60);doc.text(name,14,30);doc.setTextColor(0);
  const avg=getStudentAvg(last),f=getStudentFails(last);
  doc.setFont('helvetica','normal');doc.setFontSize(11);
  doc.text(`Media evaluación ordinaria: ${avg!==null?avg.toFixed(2):'—'}   |   Suspensos: ${f}`,14,40);
  const cols=['Materia',...loaded.map(t=>trimLabelShort(t))];
  const rows=state.subjects.map(sub=>{const r=[subName(sub)];loaded.forEach(t=>{const s=state.trims[t].students.find(x=>x.name===name);const g=s?s.grades[sub]:null;r.push(!g||g.type==='absent'?'—':g.type==='np'?'NP':(g.value%1===0?g.value.toString():g.value.toFixed(1)));});return r;});
  doc.autoTable({head:[cols],body:rows,startY:46,styles:{fontSize:9,cellPadding:2.5},headStyles:{fillColor:[26,31,52],textColor:[200,210,255]},
    didParseCell:d=>{if(d.section==='body'&&d.column.index>0){const v=parseFloat(d.cell.raw);if(!isNaN(v)){if(v<5){d.cell.styles.textColor=[220,80,80];d.cell.styles.fontStyle='bold';}else if(v>=9)d.cell.styles.textColor=[40,160,70];}}}});
  let y=doc.lastAutoTable.finalY+10;
  const agTxt=agreementsText(name);
  if (agTxt) { doc.setFont('helvetica','bold');doc.setFontSize(12);doc.text('Acuerdos de la junta:',14,y);y+=6;doc.setFont('helvetica','normal');doc.setFontSize(10);doc.text(doc.splitTextToSize(agTxt,180),14,y);y+=10; }
  if (state.config.notes[name]) { doc.setFont('helvetica','bold');doc.setFontSize(12);doc.text('Observaciones:',14,y);y+=6;doc.setFont('helvetica','normal');doc.setFontSize(10);doc.text(doc.splitTextToSize(state.config.notes[name],180),14,y); }
  doc.save(`ficha_${name.replace(/\s+/g,'_')}.pdf`);
}

// ============================================================
//  INFORMES COMPLETOS (grupal e individual)
// ============================================================
function pdfHeader(doc, title, subtitle) {
  doc.setFillColor(26,31,52); doc.rect(0,0,doc.internal.pageSize.getWidth(),26,'F');
  doc.setTextColor(232,234,246); doc.setFont('helvetica','bold'); doc.setFontSize(15); doc.text(title,14,12);
  doc.setFont('helvetica','normal'); doc.setFontSize(9); doc.setTextColor(180,190,230); doc.text(subtitle,14,19);
  doc.setTextColor(0,0,0);
}
function pdfFooter(doc) {
  const n=doc.internal.getNumberOfPages();
  for(let i=1;i<=n;i++){ doc.setPage(i); doc.setFontSize(8); doc.setTextColor(150);
    doc.text(`Generado el ${new Date().toLocaleDateString('es-ES')} · Panel de Evaluación`, 14, doc.internal.pageSize.getHeight()-8);
    doc.text(`Página ${i} de ${n}`, doc.internal.pageSize.getWidth()-32, doc.internal.pageSize.getHeight()-8); }
}
const GREEN=[40,160,70], RED=[220,80,80], HEAD={fillColor:[26,31,52],textColor:[200,210,255]};

// Dibuja un gráfico de barras horizontales nativo en el PDF (sin librerías externas).
// items: [{label, value (0-100), sub (texto a la derecha), color:[r,g,b]}]
function drawBarChart(doc, x, y, w, items, opts={}) {
  const rowH = opts.rowH || 7, gap = 2, labelW = opts.labelW || 38, valW = 22;
  const barMax = w - labelW - valW;
  items.forEach((it,i)=>{
    const cy = y + i*(rowH+gap);
    doc.setFontSize(8); doc.setTextColor(60,60,60); doc.setFont('helvetica','normal');
    doc.text(it.label.length>22?it.label.slice(0,21)+'…':it.label, x, cy+rowH-2);
    // pista de fondo
    doc.setFillColor(230,232,240); doc.roundedRect(x+labelW, cy, barMax, rowH-1, 1,1,'F');
    // barra
    const bw = Math.max(0.5, barMax * (it.value/100));
    const c = it.color || [108,143,255];
    doc.setFillColor(c[0],c[1],c[2]); doc.roundedRect(x+labelW, cy, bw, rowH-1, 1,1,'F');
    // valor
    doc.setTextColor(c[0],c[1],c[2]); doc.setFont('helvetica','bold'); doc.setFontSize(8);
    doc.text(it.sub||`${it.value.toFixed(0)}%`, x+labelW+barMax+3, cy+rowH-2);
  });
  doc.setTextColor(0,0,0);
  return y + items.length*(rowH+gap);
}

function exportFullGroupReport() {
  const { jsPDF }=window.jspdf; const doc=new jsPDF({orientation:'landscape',unit:'mm',format:'a4'});
  const loaded=getLoadedTrims(); if(!loaded.length)return;
  const td=state.trims[getLastTrim()];
  pdfHeader(doc,'INFORME DE EVALUACIÓN DEL GRUPO',`${loaded.map(t=>trimLabel(t)).join(' · ')} · ${td.students.length} alumnos · ${state.subjects.length} materias`);

  const avgs=td.students.map(getStudentAvg).filter(v=>v!==null);
  const gAvg=avgs.length?(avgs.reduce((a,b)=>a+b,0)/avgs.length):0;
  const passing=td.students.filter(s=>getStudentFails(s)===0).length;
  const totalFails=td.students.reduce((a,s)=>a+getStudentFails(s),0);
  doc.setFont('helvetica','bold');doc.setFontSize(13);doc.text('1. Indicadores generales',14,38);
  doc.autoTable({startY:42,styles:{fontSize:10,cellPadding:3},headStyles:HEAD,head:[['Indicador','Valor']],
    body:[['Media del grupo (ordinaria)',gAvg.toFixed(2)],
      ['Alumnos sin suspensos',`${passing} de ${td.students.length} (${((passing/td.students.length)*100).toFixed(0)}%)`],
      ['Total de suspensos',totalFails.toString()],['Nota mínima para aprobar',passThreshold().toString()]],columnStyles:{0:{cellWidth:90}}});

  let y=doc.lastAutoTable.finalY+10;
  doc.setFont('helvetica','bold');doc.setFontSize(13);doc.text('2. Resumen por materias',14,y);
  // Datos por materia (reutilizados para tabla y gráficos)
  const subjStats = td.subjects.map(sub=>{
    const gs=td.students.map(s=>s.grades[sub]).filter(g=>g&&g.type==='grade');
    const p=gs.filter(g=>isPass(g.value)).length;
    const avg=gs.length?(gs.reduce((x,g)=>x+g.value,0)/gs.length):null;
    const pct=gs.length?(p/gs.length)*100:0;
    return { sub, name:subName(sub), evaluated:gs.length, pass:p, fail:gs.length-p, avg, pct };
  });
  const sd=subjStats.map(s=>[s.name,s.evaluated.toString(),s.pass.toString(),s.fail.toString(),s.avg!==null?s.avg.toFixed(2):'—',s.evaluated?s.pct.toFixed(0)+'%':'—']);
  doc.autoTable({startY:y+4,styles:{fontSize:8,cellPadding:2},headStyles:HEAD,head:[['Materia','Evaluados','Aprob.','Susp.','Media','% Aprob.']],body:sd,
    didParseCell:d=>{if(d.section==='body'&&d.column.index===5){const v=parseFloat(d.cell.raw);if(!isNaN(v)){d.cell.styles.fontStyle='bold';d.cell.styles.textColor=v>=70?GREEN:v>=50?[200,150,50]:RED;}}}});

  // 2b. Gráficos de materias (página propia)
  doc.addPage();
  const W=doc.internal.pageSize.getWidth();
  const colW=(W-28-12)/2;  // dos columnas
  doc.setFont('helvetica','bold');doc.setFontSize(13);doc.text('Porcentaje de aprobados por materia',14,16);
  const pctItems = subjStats.map(s=>({ label:s.name, value:s.pct, sub:`${s.pct.toFixed(0)}%`,
    color: s.pct>=70?GREEN : s.pct>=50?[230,170,40] : RED }));
  drawBarChart(doc, 14, 22, colW, pctItems, {rowH:7});

  doc.setFont('helvetica','bold');doc.setFontSize(13);doc.text('Nota media por materia',14+colW+12,16);
  const avgItems = subjStats.map(s=>({ label:s.name, value:(s.avg||0)*10, sub:(s.avg!==null?s.avg.toFixed(1):'—'),
    color: (s.avg||0)>=passThreshold()+2?GREEN : (s.avg||0)>=passThreshold()?[230,170,40] : RED }));
  drawBarChart(doc, 14+colW+12, 22, colW, avgItems, {rowH:7});

  // 2c. Aprobados vs suspensos (barras apiladas simples por materia)
  let gy = 22 + Math.max(pctItems.length, avgItems.length)*9 + 14;
  if (gy > doc.internal.pageSize.getHeight()-60) { doc.addPage(); gy=20; }
  doc.setFont('helvetica','bold');doc.setFontSize(13);doc.text('Aprobados / suspensos por materia',14,gy);
  gy+=8;
  const maxN = Math.max(...subjStats.map(s=>s.evaluated),1);
  const chartW = W-28, labelW=40, barMax=chartW-labelW-30;
  subjStats.forEach((s,i)=>{
    const cy=gy+i*9;
    doc.setFontSize(8);doc.setTextColor(60,60,60);doc.setFont('helvetica','normal');
    doc.text(s.name.length>24?s.name.slice(0,23)+'…':s.name,14,cy+5);
    const passW = barMax*(s.pass/maxN), failW=barMax*(s.fail/maxN);
    doc.setFillColor(GREEN[0],GREEN[1],GREEN[2]); doc.roundedRect(14+labelW,cy,Math.max(0.3,passW),6,1,1,'F');
    doc.setFillColor(RED[0],RED[1],RED[2]); doc.rect(14+labelW+passW,cy,Math.max(0,failW),6,'F');
    doc.setTextColor(80,80,80);doc.setFont('helvetica','bold');
    doc.text(`${s.pass}✓ / ${s.fail}✗`,14+labelW+barMax+3,cy+5);
  });
  doc.setTextColor(0,0,0);
  // leyenda
  const ly = gy+subjStats.length*9+4;
  doc.setFillColor(GREEN[0],GREEN[1],GREEN[2]);doc.rect(14,ly,4,4,'F');doc.setFontSize(8);doc.setTextColor(80,80,80);doc.text('Aprobados',20,ly+3.5);
  doc.setFillColor(RED[0],RED[1],RED[2]);doc.rect(50,ly,4,4,'F');doc.text('Suspensos',56,ly+3.5);doc.setTextColor(0,0,0);

  // 2d. Evolución de la media por materia entre registros (solo si hay 2+)
  if (loaded.length>=2) {
    doc.addPage();
    doc.setFont('helvetica','bold');doc.setFontSize(13);doc.text('Evolución de la media por materia',14,16);
    doc.setFont('helvetica','normal');doc.setFontSize(8);doc.setTextColor(120);
    doc.text('Media del grupo en cada materia a lo largo de los registros cargados (la última es la ordinaria).',14,21);doc.setTextColor(0);
    const evoCols=['Materia',...loaded.map(t=>trimLabelShort(t)),'Evolución'];
    const evoRows=td.subjects.map(sub=>{
      const r=[subName(sub)]; const vals=[];
      loaded.forEach(t=>{const a=getSubjectAvg(sub,state.trims[t]);vals.push(a);r.push(a!==null?a.toFixed(2):'—');});
      const tr=getTrend(vals); r.push(tr.icon+' '+(tr.diff?(tr.diff>0?'+':'')+tr.diff.toFixed(1):'—')); return r;
    });
    doc.autoTable({startY:26,styles:{fontSize:8,cellPadding:2},headStyles:HEAD,head:[evoCols],body:evoRows,
      didParseCell:d=>{
        if(d.section==='body'&&d.column.index>0&&d.column.index<=loaded.length){const v=parseFloat(d.cell.raw);if(!isNaN(v)){if(isFail(v)){d.cell.styles.textColor=RED;}else if(v>=passThreshold()+2)d.cell.styles.textColor=GREEN;}}
        if(d.section==='body'&&d.column.index===loaded.length+1){const raw=d.cell.raw;if(raw.includes('↑'))d.cell.styles.textColor=GREEN;else if(raw.includes('↓'))d.cell.styles.textColor=RED;d.cell.styles.fontStyle='bold';}
      }});

    // Gráfico de líneas: evolución de cada materia (mini-sparklines en dos columnas, con salto de página)
    let ey=doc.lastAutoTable.finalY+10;
    const pageH=doc.internal.pageSize.getHeight();
    if (ey > pageH-50) { doc.addPage(); ey=20; }
    doc.setFont('helvetica','bold');doc.setFontSize(13);doc.text('Tendencia visual por materia',14,ey);
    ey+=8;
    const W2=doc.internal.pageSize.getWidth();
    const colCount=2, colGap=14, colWidth=(W2-28-colGap)/colCount;
    const sparkH=10, rowGap=5, labelW=42, sparkW=colWidth-labelW-16;
    const rowStep=sparkH+rowGap, bottomMargin=18;
    // Avanzamos por filas (cada fila contiene 2 materias). Controlamos el salto de página por fila.
    const totalRows=Math.ceil(td.subjects.length/colCount);
    let rowY=ey;
    for (let row=0; row<totalRows; row++) {
      if (rowY+sparkH > pageH-bottomMargin) { doc.addPage(); rowY=20; }
      for (let col=0; col<colCount; col++) {
        const i=row*colCount+col;
        if (i>=td.subjects.length) break;
        const sub=td.subjects[i];
        const sx=14+col*(colWidth+colGap), sy=rowY;
        doc.setFontSize(8);doc.setTextColor(60,60,60);doc.setFont('helvetica','normal');
        doc.text(subName(sub).length>20?subName(sub).slice(0,19)+'…':subName(sub),sx,sy+sparkH/2+1);
        const vals=loaded.map(t=>getSubjectAvg(sub,state.trims[t]));
        const bx=sx+labelW, bw=sparkW;
        const baseY=sy+sparkH-(passThreshold()/10)*sparkH;
        doc.setDrawColor(210,213,225);doc.setLineWidth(0.2);doc.line(bx,baseY,bx+bw,baseY);
        doc.setDrawColor(108,143,255);doc.setLineWidth(0.6);
        let prevX=null,prevY=null;
        vals.forEach((v,j)=>{
          if(v===null)return;
          const px=bx+(loaded.length>1?(j/(loaded.length-1))*bw:0);
          const py=sy+sparkH-(v/10)*sparkH;
          if(prevX!==null)doc.line(prevX,prevY,px,py);
          doc.setFillColor(v>=passThreshold()?40:220,v>=passThreshold()?160:80,v>=passThreshold()?70:80);
          doc.circle(px,py,0.8,'F');
          prevX=px;prevY=py;
        });
        const lastV=vals[vals.length-1];
        if(lastV!==null){doc.setFontSize(7);doc.setTextColor(lastV>=passThreshold()?40:220,lastV>=passThreshold()?160:80,lastV>=passThreshold()?70:80);doc.setFont('helvetica','bold');doc.text(lastV.toFixed(1),bx+bw+2,sy+sparkH/2+1);}
      }
      rowY+=rowStep;
    }
    doc.setTextColor(0,0,0);doc.setDrawColor(0,0,0);
  }

  doc.addPage();
  doc.setFont('helvetica','bold');doc.setFontSize(13);doc.text('3. Calificaciones completas',14,16);
  const cols=['Alumno/a','Media','Susp.',...td.subjects.map(s=>s)];
  const rows=td.students.map(s=>{const a=getStudentAvg(s);const c=[s.name,a!==null?a.toFixed(1):'—',getStudentFails(s).toString()];td.subjects.forEach(sub=>{const g=s.grades[sub];c.push(!g||g.type==='absent'?'—':g.type==='np'?'NP':(g.value%1===0?g.value.toString():g.value.toFixed(1)));});return c;});
  doc.autoTable({startY:20,styles:{fontSize:6.5,cellPadding:1.5},headStyles:HEAD,head:[cols],body:rows,
    didParseCell:d=>{if(d.section==='body'&&d.column.index>2){const v=parseFloat(d.cell.raw);if(!isNaN(v)){if(isFail(v)){d.cell.styles.textColor=RED;d.cell.styles.fontStyle='bold';}else if(v>=9)d.cell.styles.textColor=GREEN;}}}});

  const { alerts } = computeAlerts();
  doc.addPage();
  doc.setFont('helvetica','bold');doc.setFontSize(13);doc.text('4. Alumnado que requiere atención',14,16);
  const alertRows=[];
  alerts.risk.forEach(a=>alertRows.push([a.name,'Riesgo',`${a.fails} susp., media ${a.avg.toFixed(1)}`]));
  alerts.drop.forEach(a=>alertRows.push([a.name,'Caída brusca',`${a.drop.toFixed(1)} pts`]));
  alerts.manyFails.forEach(a=>alertRows.push([a.name,'3+ suspensos',`${a.fails} suspensos`]));
  alerts.belowGroup.forEach(a=>alertRows.push([a.name,'Bajo el grupo',`media ${a.avg.toFixed(1)} (${a.diff.toFixed(1)} vs grupo)`]));
  if (alertRows.length) doc.autoTable({startY:20,styles:{fontSize:9,cellPadding:2.5},headStyles:HEAD,head:[['Alumno/a','Tipo de alerta','Detalle']],body:alertRows});
  else { doc.setFont('helvetica','normal');doc.setFontSize(10);doc.text('Sin alertas destacables.',14,24); }

  const withAg=Object.keys(state.config.agreements||{}).filter(n=>getAgreements(n).length);
  if (withAg.length) {
    let yy=(alertRows.length?doc.lastAutoTable.finalY:26)+10;
    doc.setFont('helvetica','bold');doc.setFontSize(13);doc.text('5. Acuerdos de la junta',14,yy);
    doc.autoTable({startY:yy+4,styles:{fontSize:9,cellPadding:2.5},headStyles:HEAD,head:[['Alumno/a','Acuerdos','Observaciones']],
      body:withAg.map(n=>[n,agreementsText(n),state.config.notes[n]||''])});
  }

  // 6. Medidas, motivos, faltas y decisiones (agrupado)
  const allNames=getStudentList();
  const namesWithMeas=allNames.filter(n=>hasMeasures(n));
  if (namesWithMeas.length) {
    doc.addPage();
    doc.setFont('helvetica','bold');doc.setFontSize(13);doc.text('6. Sesión de evaluación — medidas y decisiones',14,16);
    let yy=24;

    // 6a. Medidas de seguimiento agrupadas: por cada medida, qué alumnos la tienen
    const segRows=[];
    MEASURES_SEGUIMIENTO.forEach(opt=>{
      const who=allNames.filter(n=>(state.config.measures[n]?.seguimiento||[]).includes(opt.id));
      if(who.length) segRows.push([opt.label, who.length.toString(), who.join(', ')]);
    });
    if(segRows.length){
      doc.setFont('helvetica','bold');doc.setFontSize(11);doc.text('Medidas adoptadas / seguimiento',14,yy);
      doc.autoTable({startY:yy+3,styles:{fontSize:8,cellPadding:2},headStyles:HEAD,head:[['Medida','Nº','Alumnado']],body:segRows,columnStyles:{0:{cellWidth:60},1:{cellWidth:12}}});
      yy=doc.lastAutoTable.finalY+8;
    }

    // 6b. Motivos de rendimiento agrupados
    const motRows=[];
    MEASURES_MOTIVOS.forEach(opt=>{
      const who=allNames.filter(n=>state.config.measures[n]?.rendimiento?.[opt.id]);
      if(who.length){
        const detail=who.map(n=>{const subs=state.config.measures[n].rendimiento[opt.id]||[];return n+(subs.length?` (${subs.map(subName).join(', ')})`:'');});
        motRows.push([opt.label, who.length.toString(), detail.join('; ')]);
      }
    });
    if(motRows.length){
      if(yy>doc.internal.pageSize.getHeight()-40){doc.addPage();yy=20;}
      doc.setFont('helvetica','bold');doc.setFontSize(11);doc.text('Principales motivos de bajo rendimiento',14,yy);
      doc.autoTable({startY:yy+3,styles:{fontSize:8,cellPadding:2},headStyles:HEAD,head:[['Motivo','Nº','Alumnado (materias)']],body:motRows,columnStyles:{0:{cellWidth:55},1:{cellWidth:12}}});
      yy=doc.lastAutoTable.finalY+8;
    }

    // 6c. Decisiones
    const decRows=allNames.filter(n=>state.config.measures[n]?.decision).map(n=>{
      const d=MEASURES_DECISION.find(x=>x.id===state.config.measures[n].decision);
      return [n, d?d.label:'', state.config.measures[n].decisionText||''];
    });
    if(decRows.length){
      if(yy>doc.internal.pageSize.getHeight()-40){doc.addPage();yy=20;}
      doc.setFont('helvetica','bold');doc.setFontSize(11);doc.text('Decisiones de promoción',14,yy);
      // resumen de conteo
      const counts={}; decRows.forEach(r=>counts[r[1]]=(counts[r[1]]||0)+1);
      const summary=Object.entries(counts).map(([k,v])=>`${k}: ${v}`).join('   ·   ');
      doc.setFont('helvetica','normal');doc.setFontSize(9);doc.setTextColor(100);doc.text(summary,14,yy+5);doc.setTextColor(0);
      doc.autoTable({startY:yy+8,styles:{fontSize:8,cellPadding:2},headStyles:HEAD,head:[['Alumno/a','Decisión','Observaciones']],body:decRows,
        didParseCell:dd=>{if(dd.section==='body'&&dd.column.index===1){const v=dd.cell.raw;if(v==='Promociona')dd.cell.styles.textColor=GREEN;else if(v==='No promociona')dd.cell.styles.textColor=RED;else if(v==='Votación')dd.cell.styles.textColor=[230,140,40];}}});
      yy=doc.lastAutoTable.finalY+8;
    }

    // 6d. Resumen de faltas de asistencia
    const attRows=allNames.filter(n=>state.config.attendance[n]).map(n=>{const a=state.config.attendance[n];return [n,(a.jDays||0).toString(),(a.uDays||0).toString(),(a.jSlots||0).toString(),(a.uSlots||0).toString(),(a.delays||0).toString()];}).filter(r=>r.slice(1).some(v=>v!=='0'));
    if(attRows.length){
      if(yy>doc.internal.pageSize.getHeight()-40){doc.addPage();yy=20;}
      doc.setFont('helvetica','bold');doc.setFontSize(11);doc.text('Faltas de asistencia',14,yy);
      doc.autoTable({startY:yy+3,styles:{fontSize:8,cellPadding:2},headStyles:HEAD,head:[['Alumno/a','Días J.','Días I.','Tramos J.','Tramos I.','Retrasos']],body:attRows,
        didParseCell:dd=>{if(dd.section==='body'&&(dd.column.index===2||dd.column.index===4)){const v=parseInt(dd.cell.raw);if(v>0){dd.cell.styles.textColor=RED;dd.cell.styles.fontStyle='bold';}}}});
    }
  }

  pdfFooter(doc);
  doc.save('informe_grupo.pdf');
}

// Renderiza una página completa de informe individual (cabecera + resumen + gráficos + tablas).
// Reutilizada por el informe individual suelto y por el informe de todos los alumnos.
function renderStudentReportPage(doc, name, loaded) {
  const trimData=loaded.map(t=>({trim:t,student:state.trims[t].students.find(s=>s.name===name)})).filter(x=>x.student);
  if (!trimData.length) return;
  const last=trimData[trimData.length-1].student;
  const avg=getStudentAvg(last),f=getStudentFails(last);
  const trend=getTrend(trimData.map(x=>getStudentAvg(x.student)));
  pdfHeader(doc,'INFORME INDIVIDUAL DE EVALUACIÓN',`${name} · ${loaded.map(t=>trimLabel(t)).join(' · ')}`);

  doc.setFont('helvetica','bold');doc.setFontSize(13);doc.text('Resumen',14,38);
  const tendLabel = trend.diff>0.5?'Mejora':trend.diff<-0.5?'Empeora':'Estable';
  doc.autoTable({startY:42,styles:{fontSize:10,cellPadding:3},headStyles:HEAD,head:[['Indicador','Valor']],
    body:[['Media evaluación ordinaria',avg!==null?avg.toFixed(2):'—'],['Materias suspensas',f.toString()],
      ['Tendencia (informativa)',`${tendLabel} (${trend.label})`]],columnStyles:{0:{cellWidth:80}}});

  let y=doc.lastAutoTable.finalY+10;
  // Gráfico de barras: notas de la evaluación ordinaria por materia
  doc.setFont('helvetica','bold');doc.setFontSize(13);doc.text('Notas de la evaluación ordinaria',14,y);
  y+=4;
  const pageH0=doc.internal.pageSize.getHeight();
  const W0=doc.internal.pageSize.getWidth();
  const bRowH=6.5, bGap=2.4, bLabelW=46, bValW=12, bScaleMax=10;
  const bBarMax=W0-28-bLabelW-bValW;
  const bx0=14+bLabelW;
  state.subjects.forEach(sub=>{
    if (y+bRowH > pageH0-18) { doc.addPage(); y=20; }
    const g=last.grades[sub];
    const has=g&&g.type==='grade';
    const v=has?g.value:null;
    doc.setFontSize(8);doc.setTextColor(60,60,60);doc.setFont('helvetica','normal');
    doc.text(subName(sub).length>26?subName(sub).slice(0,25)+'…':subName(sub),14,y+bRowH-1.5);
    doc.setFillColor(232,234,240);doc.roundedRect(bx0,y,bBarMax,bRowH-1,0.8,0.8,'F');
    const passX=bx0+bBarMax*(passThreshold()/bScaleMax);
    doc.setDrawColor(150,155,170);doc.setLineWidth(0.3);doc.line(passX,y-0.5,passX,y+bRowH-0.5);
    if (has) {
      const bw=Math.max(0.6,bBarMax*(v/bScaleMax));
      const pass=v>=passThreshold();
      const c=pass?(v>=passThreshold()+2?[40,160,70]:[230,170,40]):[220,80,80];
      doc.setFillColor(c[0],c[1],c[2]);doc.roundedRect(bx0,y,bw,bRowH-1,0.8,0.8,'F');
      doc.setTextColor(c[0],c[1],c[2]);doc.setFont('helvetica','bold');doc.setFontSize(8);
      doc.text(v%1===0?v.toString():v.toFixed(1),bx0+bBarMax+2,y+bRowH-1.5);
    } else {
      doc.setTextColor(150);doc.setFont('helvetica','normal');doc.setFontSize(7.5);
      doc.text(g&&g.type==='np'?'NP':'—',bx0+bBarMax+2,y+bRowH-1.5);
    }
    y+=bRowH+bGap;
  });
  doc.setTextColor(0,0,0);doc.setDrawColor(0,0,0);
  doc.setFontSize(7);doc.setTextColor(130);
  doc.text(`Escala 0-10. La línea vertical marca el aprobado (${passThreshold()}). Verde = bien, ámbar = aprobado justo, rojo = suspenso.`,14,y+1);
  doc.setTextColor(0,0,0); y+=8;
  if (y > pageH0-50) { doc.addPage(); y=20; }

  doc.setFont('helvetica','bold');doc.setFontSize(13);doc.text('Calificaciones por materia',14,y);
  doc.setFont('helvetica','normal');doc.setFontSize(8);doc.setTextColor(120);doc.text('(Las evaluaciones previas son informativas; la nota que cuenta es la ordinaria)',14,y+5);doc.setTextColor(0);
  const cols=['Materia',...loaded.map(t=>trimLabelShort(t)),'Tendencia'];
  const rows=state.subjects.map(sub=>{
    const r=[subName(sub)+(isOptional(sub)?' (opt.)':'')]; const vals=[];
    loaded.forEach(t=>{const s=state.trims[t].students.find(x=>x.name===name);const g=s?s.grades[sub]:null;r.push(!g||g.type==='absent'?'—':g.type==='np'?'NP':(g.value%1===0?g.value.toString():g.value.toFixed(1)));vals.push(g&&g.type==='grade'?g.value:null);});
    const tr=getTrend(vals); r.push(tr.icon+' '+(tr.diff?tr.diff.toFixed(1):'—')); return r;
  });
  doc.autoTable({startY:y+8,styles:{fontSize:9,cellPadding:2.5},headStyles:HEAD,head:[cols],body:rows,
    didParseCell:d=>{if(d.section==='body'&&d.column.index>0&&d.column.index<=loaded.length){const v=parseFloat(d.cell.raw);if(!isNaN(v)){if(isFail(v)){d.cell.styles.textColor=RED;d.cell.styles.fontStyle='bold';}else if(v>=9)d.cell.styles.textColor=GREEN;}}}});

  y=doc.lastAutoTable.finalY+10;

  // Gráfico de evolución por materia (solo con 2+ registros)
  if (loaded.length>=2) {
    if (y > doc.internal.pageSize.getHeight()-60) { doc.addPage(); y=20; }
    doc.setFont('helvetica','bold');doc.setFontSize(13);doc.text('Evolución por materia',14,y);
    y+=8;
    const W2=doc.internal.pageSize.getWidth();
    const colCount=2, colGap=14, colWidth=(W2-28-colGap)/colCount;
    const sparkH=11, rowGap=5, labelW=44, sparkW=colWidth-labelW-14;
    const subs=state.subjects;
    const pageH=doc.internal.pageSize.getHeight(), rowStep=sparkH+rowGap, bottomMargin=20;
    const totalRows=Math.ceil(subs.length/colCount);
    let rowY=y;
    for (let row=0; row<totalRows; row++) {
      if (rowY+sparkH > pageH-bottomMargin) { doc.addPage(); rowY=20; }
      for (let col=0; col<colCount; col++) {
        const i=row*colCount+col;
        if (i>=subs.length) break;
        const sub=subs[i];
        const sx=14+col*(colWidth+colGap), sy=rowY;
        doc.setFontSize(8);doc.setTextColor(60,60,60);doc.setFont('helvetica','normal');
        doc.text(subName(sub).length>21?subName(sub).slice(0,20)+'…':subName(sub),sx,sy+sparkH/2+1);
        const vals=loaded.map(t=>{const s=state.trims[t].students.find(x=>x.name===name);const g=s?s.grades[sub]:null;return g&&g.type==='grade'?g.value:null;});
        const bx=sx+labelW, bw=sparkW;
        const baseY=sy+sparkH-(passThreshold()/10)*sparkH;
        doc.setDrawColor(210,213,225);doc.setLineWidth(0.2);doc.line(bx,baseY,bx+bw,baseY);
        doc.setDrawColor(108,143,255);doc.setLineWidth(0.7);
        let prevX=null,prevY=null;
        vals.forEach((v,j)=>{
          if(v===null)return;
          const px=bx+(loaded.length>1?(j/(loaded.length-1))*bw:0);
